parameters.content: ={{ $json.error }}

📖 ReceiptFlow Commands
─────────────────────────────
!summary [YYYYMMDD YYYYMMDD]
  → Your receipt summary for a date range
  → Defaults to last 4 weeks if no dates given
  → Example: !summary 20260501 20260524

!last [N]
  → Your last N receipts (default 5, max 20)
  → Example: !last 5

!stores
  → Stores you have visited in the last 52 weeks with spend totals

!email you@example.com
  → Register or update your email address

!export [YYYYMMDD YYYYMMDD]
  → Email a CSV report to your registered email
  → Defaults to last 4 weeks if no dates given
  → Example: !export 20260501 20260524

!help
  → Show this help message

─────────────────────────────
⚠️ Disclaimer
ReceiptFlow uses AI (LLM) to parse receipt images. Receipt data may be used by the LLM provider for model training. This system is in testing — accuracy is not guaranteed and records may be deleted without prior notice. Use at your own discretion.
